title: cerasus itosakura
intro: Cerasus itosakura is a species of cherry tree native to Japan, classified under the genus Prunus in the family Rosaceae. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Japanese medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and astringent properties. The health benefits of Cerasus itosakura include reducing fever, soothing skin irritations, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. In herbal preparations, the plant's bark, leaves, and flowers are used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
